Program_Description: The Women, Infants and Children (WIC) Program is a supplemental nutrition education program to promote and maintain the health of pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women, infants and children from birth to five years of age.
Target_Population: Low-income pregnant, postpartum, and breastfeeding women; infants and children
